title: Big Update 2.00
homeNotice: Big Update 2.00 content is now active for everyone.
items: Global online leaderboard across devices with live points
Shared live countdown synced through Netlify
New Online mode: Rock Paper Scissors with live matchmaking
New Online mode: Click Rush real-time click battles
New Online mode: Connect 4 head-to-head live matches
New Online mode: Memory Flip race (first to clear all cards wins)
Built-in ad blocker toggle in Settings
New game: Ultimate Car Driving Simulator

games.name: Rock Paper Scissors Online
games.description: Match live against another player on a different device.
games.tip: Submit your move quickly so rounds resolve faster.
instructions: Wait in queue until another player joins.
Pick Rock, Paper, or Scissors each round.
First to 5 round wins takes the match.

games.name: Click Rush Online
games.description: 10-second live click race against another player in real time.
games.tip: Start clicking instantly when the timer turns live.
instructions: Queue and wait for another player.
When the countdown ends, click as fast as possible.
Most clicks at 10 seconds wins.

games.name: Connect 4 Online
games.description: Play Connect 4 live against another player on a different device.
games.tip: Control the center columns to create multiple win lines.
instructions: Queue and wait for another player.
Take turns dropping discs by clicking a column.
Connect four discs before your opponent.

games.name: Memory Flip Online
games.description: Race another player online. First to find all card pairs wins.
games.tip: Memorize a row pattern and avoid random flips.
instructions: Queue and wait for another player.
Flip cards and match pairs as fast as possible.
First player to clear all cards wins.

games.name: Wheelie Life Modded
games.description: Bike balance challenge with modded gameplay and trick control.
games.tip: Feather your throttle to hold long wheelies.
instructions: Use keyboard controls shown in-game.
Balance your bike and keep the wheelie going.
Restart and retry to improve your run.

games.name: Google Baseball
games.description: Classic Google Doodle baseball with simple one-button timing.
games.tip: Wait for the pitch and swing right as the ball reaches the plate.
instructions: Press space or click to swing.
Time each hit for longer distance.
Keep batting to set a high score.

games.name: Google Doodle Cricket
games.description: Google cricket doodle batting game with quick timing swings.
games.tip: Swing a little late to send cleaner boundary shots.
instructions: Press space or click to bat.
Time each shot as the ball reaches you.
Keep scoring until you get out.

games.name: Parking Fury 3
games.description: Precision driving and parking challenges in busy city lanes.
games.tip: Slow down before tight turns to avoid crashes.
instructions: Use arrow keys to steer and drive.
Follow markers to reach each parking spot.
Avoid collisions to finish each level.

games.name: Block Blast
games.description: Fast block puzzle action where smart placements keep your board clear.
games.tip: Set up combo clears by leaving room for larger shapes.
instructions: Drag and place blocks onto the board.
Complete rows or columns to clear them.
Plan ahead to avoid running out of space.

games.name: Ragdoll Hit
games.description: Physics-based stickman fighting with ragdoll knockback and fast rounds.
games.tip: Use quick hits to keep your balance and knock enemies off platforms.
instructions: Use the in-game controls to move and attack.
Knock out your opponent using momentum and timing.
Restart quickly and try better combos each round.

games.name: Top Speed Racing 3D
games.description: Open-road driving with fast cars, stunts, and freestyle racing challenges.
games.tip: Use smooth steering at high speed to avoid spin-outs on corners.
instructions: Use arrow keys or WASD to drive.
Explore ramps and roads to build speed.
Keep control to set longer high-speed runs.

games.name: Ultimate Car Driving Simulator
games.description: City driving sandbox with free roam and realistic car handling.
games.tip: Brake before sharp turns to keep traction and control.
instructions: Use arrow keys or WASD to steer and drive.
Explore the map and test car handling.
Chain clean driving lines for better runs.
